{{CargoRelic
|name=Organ Resonator
|class_id=20823
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Also known as the organ nano-connection device, it utilizes nanotechnology to connect the organs within the body, creating a resonance effect that generates a powerful life force.
|fame=12
|art=17
|fth=17
|civ=15
|tech=29
|ss1=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +1<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss2=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +3<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss3=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +5<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss4=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +5<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40
|ss7=Per Organ implanted, Snail ATK +5<br>Organs Implanted: 40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
